action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_component
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a specific component of the environment state to allow the Agent to observe the current environment values.

component_name.description: The specific state field to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: search_contract_clauses
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the contract body for specific terminology, clauses, or sections.

query.description: The keyword or provision title to search for (e.g., 'Mesh Topology').

action_set_definitions.name: update_risk_register
action_set_definitions.description: Adds a legal hazard or breach status to the risk register.

clause_reference.description: The specific clause identifier or section affected.

description.description: A detailed explanation of why the party is in breach or the nature of the legal hazard.

action_set_definitions.name: update_checklist
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the fulfillment status of specific requirements in the checklist.

requirement_name.description: The name of the requirement to update (e.g., 'EcoPower Joinder').

is_fulfilled.description: The new status of the requirement.

action_set_definitions.name: transition_phase
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the environment state to a new operational phase.

new_phase.description: The name of the target phase (e.g., 'risk_mitigation').

state_description.contract_body: The full raw text of the Non-Disclosure Agreement currently under review.
state_description.risk_register: A list of identified legal risks, each containing a clause reference, risk level, and description of the issue.
state_description.checklist_status: A mapping of standard NDA requirements (e.g., 'Mutual Obligations', 'Term Limit', 'Exclusions') to their fulfillment status (checked/unchecked).
state_description.review_metadata: Information about the legal context, including the Disclosing Party, Receiving Party, Governing Law, and Effective Date.
state_description.current_phase: The current focus of the review process (e.g., 'initial_ingestion', 'compliance_check', 'risk_mitigation').

task_initial_state.contract_body:
PROJECT HELIOS MULTI-PARTY MESH NDA. 
1. TOPOLOGY: This is a Mesh (Multiparty) Agreement. All signatories maintain direct privity. 
2. CHANGE OF CONTROL (CoC): In the event a Party is acquired by a 'Restricted Competitor', that Party's access to Tier 1 technical data is immediately revoked, and they must be flagged for ejection. 'Volt-Max' is hereby defined as a Restricted Competitor. 
3. JOINDER MECHANICS: New participants enter the Mesh via a Joinder Agreement. Eligibility requires unanimous Steering Committee approval. 
4. STEERING COMMITTEE: Currently comprised of AutoCorp and ChemCo. 
[NOTICE ATTACHED]: Lithium-X has officially completed its merger into Volt-Max as of yesterday. 
[MEMO]: Steering Committee has issued a unanimous 'YES' vote for the entry of EcoPower.
